summary: Создан общий репо lyrics-kb: двуязычный скелет (RU/EN), язык-нейтральный production/suno слой, единый index.json и journal.jsonl
Перенос RU-базы из russian-lyrics-kb: songwriting/ru, detector/ru, production, suno, genres, vocals, references. encyclopedia initially pointer.
EN theory: prosody, rhyme, song_structure, hooks_and_titles, meter_phrasing
EN techniques: object_writing, boxes_worksheets, tension_and_release, pov, figurative_language
EN detector 1.0: patterns E01–E20, whitelist W1–W6, scoring E1–E12, cliche rhymes
Added references/sound_corpus.md (v0.1), songwriting/en/EN_CRAFT_LAYER.md, encyclopedia multipart hub.
EN golden corpus EG-01..14; songwriting/cross narrative_arc + topline_phrasing.
index.json → 3.2-lyrics-kb, 61 entries; README status table; encyclopedia parts 01/02/17 seeded.
